title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN JOSE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF SAN JOSE, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN VICENTE, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO LUCIO OPEDO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4126 / 62 OG No. 22, 3745 (May 30, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4238, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN JOSE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF SAN JOSE, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN VICENTE, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO LUCIO OPEDO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the San Jose Elementary School in the barrio of San Jose, Municipality of San Vicente, Province of Camarines Norte, is hereby changed to Lucio Opedo Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
